## Pull Request Summary

Provide a description of the changes introduced by this PR. Include ticket IDs if applicable.

---

## Type of Change

Check all options that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Infrastructure/DevOps update (Terraform, Kubernetes, or Jenkins tweaks)
- [ ] Security patch (Vault modifications or credentials changes)

---

## Verification & Testing

Outline how these changes were tested:
- **Local build status**: [ ] Succeeded  [ ] Failed
- **Manual Verification steps performed**:
  1. ...

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the team styling conventions
- [ ] Code compiled successfully locally
- [ ] Automated tests run and pass without errors
- [ ] Vault configuration matches environments
- [ ] Code commits have been signed with GPG
